assertion_results.text: The report header contains a date range in the format '[Month DD, YYYY] to [Month DD, YYYY]'
assertion_results.evidence: Header reads: '# Software Testing & AI News — Mar 21, 2026 to Mar 28, 2026'

assertion_results.text: All 7 category headings are present: AI & LLM in Testing, Test Automation, Performance & Load Testing, Shift-Left & DevOps, Visual & Accessibility Testing, Tools & Releases, Industry News & Events
assertion_results.evidence: All 7 headings found: ## AI & LLM in Testing, ## Test Automation, ## Performance & Load Testing, ## Shift-Left & DevOps, ## Visual & Accessibility Testing, ## Tools & Releases, ## Industry News & Events

assertion_results.text: Each category section uses a markdown table with exactly 2 columns: Summary and Date
assertion_results.evidence: 5 of 7 categories use '| Summary | Date |' tables correctly. Performance & Load Testing and Visual & Accessibility Testing contain 'No items in this period.' plain text instead of a table. Majority vote across 3 grading passes: FAIL (assertion says 'each' section must have a table).
Footer reads: 'Sources fetched: 4 (Google News ×3, Playwright Releases) | Sources failed: 6 (DEV.to, Applitools, BrowserStack, Mabl, Cypress, ACM TOSEM) | Articles included: 20 | Period: last 7 days'

assertion_results.text: All date values in tables use the format MMM DD, YYYY (e.g. Mar 22, 2026)
assertion_results.evidence: All table rows use format e.g. 'Mar 27, 2026', 'Mar 25, 2026', 'Mar 24, 2026', 'Mar 26, 2026' — consistent MMM DD, YYYY throughout

assertion_results.text: A Highlights section is present with at least 1 bullet point
